rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is a consumer-level model of coupon redemption with endogeneity control, and the cited paper is also centered on estimating consumer preferences and coupon usage behavior (albeit from aggregate data), indicating strong conceptual/methodological overlap in the main constructs. Given this direct topical alignment and an exact DOI-matched reference, the citation is plausibly foundational or method-relevant rather than an obvious incidental mention.
